title: Kaleidoscope Texture Expansion
description: This mod adds more texture options to the soup pots from the Kaleidoscope Cookery and Kaleidoscope Nether mods, giving each dish a unique and distinct visual texture.
body:
Do you think the soup textures inside the stockpot in Kaleidoscope Cookery are all the same?
Even though the stockpots contain different soups and dishes, they only have one mysterious brown base.
Are you frustrated that Kaleidoscope Cookery and Farmer's Delight have so much potential but cannot work together?
This mod adds expanded soup textures inside the stockpot for Kaleidoscope Cookery, its add-ons, Farmer's Delight, and its add-ons.
It also adds cross-compatibility between Kaleidoscope Cookery and Farmer's Delight (and their add-ons).
